---
name: Performance Issue
about: Report slow operations, memory issues, or suggest performance improvements
title: '[PERF] '
labels: performance
assignees: ''
---

## Performance Issue Type (check one)

- [ ] **Slow Operation** - Command or feature takes too long
- [ ] **Memory Leak** - Extension consumes excessive memory
- [ ] **High CPU Usage** - Extension uses too much CPU
- [ ] **Startup Delay** - Extension takes too long to activate
- [ ] **UI Lag** - UI responsiveness issues
- [ ] **Large File Handling** - Performance problems with large files
- [ ] **Frequent Operations** - Performance issues with repeated actions
- [ ] **Optimization Suggestion** - General performance improvement idea

## Performance Description

Describe the performance issue clearly.

**Operation:**
Which command or feature has performance problems?

**Impact:**
How does this affect your workflow?

## Reproduction Steps

1. Open **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\*** (file type/size)
2. Execute **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\*** (command/feature)
3. ***
4. See performance issue

## Performance Metrics

**Observed Performance:**

- Operation took approximately: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- Memory usage: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- CPU usage: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

**Expected Performance:**

- Should take: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

## Environment

- **VS Code:** Version (e.g., 1.102.0)
- **Extension:** Version (e.g., 2.0.0)
- **OS:** Windows/macOS/Linux (specific version)
- **Node.js:** Version (if known)
- **Machine Specs:** (CPU, RAM) - optional but helpful
- **Project Size:** (number of files, total size)

## Context

**File Context:**

- File size: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- File type: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- Number of files in workspace: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

**Operation Context:**

- First time or repeated: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- With or without other extensions: **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

## Performance Profile

If available, provide performance profiling data:

```bash
[Include any profiling output or benchmarks]
```

## Comparison

**Does this happen:**

- [ ] Every time you run the operation
- [ ] Only with large files/projects
- [ ] Only on certain platforms
- [ ] Only with specific file types
- [ ] Randomly

**Has this always been an issue?**

- [ ] Yes, from version **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***
- [ ] No, started after version **\*\***\_\_\_\_**\*\***

## Optimization Suggestions

Do you have ideas for improving performance?

**Suggested Approach:**

```
[Describe your optimization idea]
```

**Technical Considerations:**
Any technical constraints or considerations?

## Additional Information

- **Screenshots/Recordings:** Performance graphs or recordings
- **Workarounds:** Any temporary workarounds you've found
- **Related Issues:** Link to related GitHub issues

## Priority

How critical is this performance issue?

- [ ] Critical - Blocks normal workflow
- [ ] High - Significantly impacts productivity
- [ ] Medium - Noticeable but manageable
- [ ] Low - Minor performance concern

---

**Thank you for helping improve performance!** ⚡
